summary: Iteration 4 testing PASSED. Backend: 32/32 iteration-4 tests pass (country required in both intakes, Dr. prefix in candidates/talent/operations, accounting CRUD+KPIs with RBAC, geography stats). Full regression: 76 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend: landing has floating WhatsApp +573028322083, LATAM dropdowns (21 options incl. placeholder) with Midnight Navy bg, country required on both forms, areas reduced to 7 standardized (prefixed 'Derecho '). Admin Panel: admin_general sees all 6 tabs; billing labels use Pendiente/Finalizada/Vencida (no 'No terminada'); each invoice row has 5 action buttons (view/edit/paylink/print/send); invoice view & edit modals open correctly; Accounting tab shows 4 KPIs, add-movement modal works, edit/delete buttons on movement rows; Geography tab shows country cards with 'Estrategia activa'. RBAC: socio_comercial does NOT see tab-accounting nor tab-talent (sales/ops/billing/geo visible).

issues: Area options labeled with 'Derecho ' prefix (e.g. 'Derecho Civil', 'Derecho de Familia') instead of the bare 7 standardized terms in PRD ('Civil', 'Familia', ...). The set is the same 7 areas only, so semantically correct, but labels diverge from spec. Confirm with product if 'Derecho ' prefix is intended.

action_items: (Optional) Decide if landing area labels should drop the 'Derecho ' prefix to match spec ('Laboral, Familia, Penal, Civil, Comercial, Administrativo, Tributario').
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPanel.jsx is large (>1400 lines); consider splitting AccountingView, GeographyView, BillingView, MovementModal and InvoiceEditModal into dedicated files for maintainability.
InvoiceEditModal save is currently a 'preview' (no real PUT endpoint). Marked as MOCKED by design — track to implement real invoice update endpoint.
Geography stats endpoint always exposes data to socio_comercial (no role restriction). Confirmed intended per PRD ('visible a todos'); fine.

with_dr_prefix accepts 'Dr ' (no dot) and 'Dra ' as already-prefixed and preserves them; this means manually-entered 'Dr Juan' will not be normalized to 'Dr. Juan'. Consider normalizing to consistent 'Dr. ' / 'Dra. ' form.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_public_intake.py (added country field to payloads to comply with new required field)
seed_data_creation: POST /api/admin-ops/accounting/seed/demo invoked during tests — creates 8 movements if empty (idempotent: returns created:0 if already seeded). Also created TEST_ accounting movement via UI and via API (UI movement remains in DB; API one was deleted by test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration-4 endpoints fully covered in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4.py. New required field: 'country' on POST /api/public/case-intake and /api/public/lawyer-application — payloads MUST include it. Accounting routes under /api/admin-ops/accounting/* require role=admin_general for write ops (POST/PUT/DELETE/seed) and return 403 for socio_comercial. Geography stats at /api/admin-ops/geography/stats is open to all admin roles. RBAC frontend: socio_comercial hides tab-accounting and tab-talent. Frontend areas in landing use 'Derecho X' / 'Derecho de Familia' labels (intentional? confirm with PRD owner).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs. Initial 3 test failures were test-side issues (Dr. prefix tuple too strict and category min_length=2 invalidated socio RBAC tests with 422 instead of 403). All fixed.
